items.message: CI analysis complete — no unit test failures on main. The only failing CI (non-live-test) check run on HEAD commit aaea332ab01a2aa9df7c92a4156b232250d4f2d8 is `js - changes - mgmt` (ID 69680285689), which shows 0 failing tests (2 passed) — its pipeline-level "1 error" is a non-test build/infrastructure failure, not a unit test regression. All other failures (`js - storage-queue - tests` and sub-jobs) are live-test pipeline runs (contain `- tests` in name) and are excluded per instructions. No GitHub issue was created.
